name: agentops
description: The operational layer for coding agents. Bookkeeping, validation, and flows that compound knowledge between sessions.

interface.shortDescription: Repo-native memory, validation gates, and agent workflows.
interface.longDescription: AgentOps packages repo-native memory, validation gates, and agent workflows for Codex so sessions can carry context forward, run repeatable development flows, verify changes locally, and track work through closeout.
defaultPrompt: Use AgentOps to inspect ready work, claim a bead, and plan the change.
Use AgentOps to validate this change against the repo gates.
Use AgentOps to prepare closeout with beads, validation, and push readiness.
